name: 8q24_11_q24_13_Langer_Giedion_TRPS_EXT1
description: Langer-Giedion syndrome / trichorhinophalangeal syndrome type II (TRPS II) — 8q24.11-q24.13 contiguous-gene-deletion encompassing TRPS1 and EXT1. Variable-size deletions (1-12 Mb); breakpoints often non-recurrent (FoSTeS/MMBIR) but flanking SD blocks at 8q24 (including the cancer-associated 8q24 SDs) mediate a fraction. Phenotype: ID, characteristic facies, sparse hair, cone-shaped epiphyses, multiple osteochondromas (EXT1 LoF).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~20-150 kb at >95% identity (8q24 region has complex SD architecture associated with MYC neighborhood); unique core contains TRPS1 (trichorhinophalangeal type I if isolated), EXT1 (multiple exostoses), RAD21, SAMD12.
